# rawValue

**Instance Property**

The raw value that represents the JavaScript type.

## Declaration

```swift
var rawValue: UInt32
```

## Initializers

- **init(_:)**: Creates a JavaScript type.
- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a JavaScript type with the specified raw value.

items.description: Creates a JavaScript type with the specified raw value.
